Memo to Project Manager — First Week Reflection

Hi PM,

Thanks for the warm welcome this week. I wanted to share some thoughts after my first few days as the Project Coordinator on the integration project.

As Project Coordinator, my role is to support the Project Manager in the delivery of the project. I will be responsible for maintaining project documentation, schedules, and status reports. I will coordinate meetings, record minutes, follow up on action items, track risks and issues, and liaise with stakeholders. I will also use Microsoft Project and Jira to keep things on track.

I see myself as a hybrid coordinator-analyst because that is what was on the job posting.

In my first 30 days I plan to:
- Be proactive
- Communicate clearly with stakeholders
- Take initiative on tasks
- Be a team player

I am excited to hit the ground running and contribute to the success of this project!

Things I don't know yet — I will learn the project as I go.

Thanks,
The new Coordinator
